Class MiiConsent

java.lang.Object
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Base
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.BaseResource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Resource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.DomainResource
org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Consent
de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
All Implemented Interfaces:
ca.uhn.fhir.model.api.IElement, CaseIdentifierValueProvider, MiiContactHealthFacilityProvider, MiiPatientProvider, PatientIdentifierValueProvider, CaseIdProvider, PatientIdProvider, Serializable, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IAnyResource, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBase, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseHasExtensions, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseHasModifierExtensions, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IBaseResource, org.hl7.fhir.instance.model.api.IDomainResource
public class MiiConsent extends org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Consent implements MiiPatientProvider, PatientIdentifierValueProvider, MiiContactHealthFacilityProvider, CaseIdentifierValueProvider

    • isAcribisConsentAllowed

      public boolean isAcribisConsentAllowed()

    • getAcribisPermitStartDate

      public Date getAcribisPermitStartDate()
      Retrieves the start date of the first permit provision that matches the Acribis criteria.

      This method checks if the current context is an Acribis form and if the document is both a privacy policy and falls under the MII consent category. If so, it filters the provision list to find the first provision that:

      It returns the start date of the matching provision's period.

      Returns:
      the start date of the first matching provision, or null if no match is found

    • getMainConsentPermitStartDate

      public Date getMainConsentPermitStartDate()
      Retrieves the start date of the first permit provision that matches the Acribis criteria.

      This method checks if the current context is an Acribis form and if the document is both a privacy policy and falls under the MII consent category. If so, it filters the provision list to find the first provision that:

      It returns the start date of the matching provision's period.

      Returns:
      the start date of the first matching provision, or null if no match is found

    • isPatDataUsageAllowed

      public boolean isPatDataUsageAllowed(Date validationDate)
      Checks if patient data usage is allowed based on consent form, policy, and specific provision code.
      Parameters:
      validationDate - the date used to validate permit periods; if null, the validity period check is skipped
      Returns:
      true if patient data usage is permitted; otherwise false

    • isPatDataUsageCurrentlyAllowed

      public boolean isPatDataUsageCurrentlyAllowed()

    • isPatDataUsage

      public boolean isPatDataUsage(Date validationDate)
      Checks only whether the patient data usage provision code is permitted (via single L1 code or all L2 codes).
      Parameters:
      validationDate - the date used to validate permit periods; if null, the validity period check is skipped
      Returns:
      true if patient data usage is permitted, otherwise false

    • isMDataUsageAllowed

      public boolean isMDataUsageAllowed(Date validationDate)
      Checks if patient data usage is allowed based on consent form, policy, and specific provision code.
      Returns:
      true if patient data usage is permitted; false otherwise.

      public boolean isMDataSaveUsage(Date validationDate)
      Checks whether the patient data usage provision code is permitted or the idat/mdat save and usage processes are allowed.
      Parameters:
      validationDate - the date used to validate permit periods; if null, the validity period check is skipped
      Returns:
      true if the mdata save and usage process is permitted, otherwise false

    • isRecontactingAllowed

      public boolean isRecontactingAllowed(Date validationDate)
      Checks if recontacting the patient for further surveys is allowed.
      Returns:
      true if recontacting is permitted; false otherwise.

    • hasPermitWithCode

      public boolean hasPermitWithCode(String code, Date validationDate)
      Checks whether a permit with the given code exists.

      If validationDate is not null, only permits that are valid at the given point in time based on their period are considered.

      Parameters:
      code - the permit code to search for
      validationDate - the date used to validate the permit period; if null, the validity period check is skipped
      Returns:
      true if a matching permit exists, otherwise false

    • isActive

      public boolean isActive()
